title: Quality of merchandise
wikitext:
[]: Quality of merchandise             Quote Post by The Triforce Fighter » Sat Apr 17, 2010 4:44 pm I was thinking of picking up a neat bag on ebay with the Nerv symbol on and I was just about to put some money on it and I thought 'I have no idea on the quality of this thing!' So I thought maybe some guys on here may have purchased the said bag (as there seemed to be a few on ebay) and well thought this will be the best place to ask. http://cgi.ebay.co.uk/Evangelion-Messenger-Shoulder-Bag-Anime-Cosplay-c303_W0QQitemZ260585313941QQcmdZViewItemQQptZLH_DefaultDomain_0?hash=item3cac185695 I just don't want to go and buy the bag and then it falls apart in the middle of school X D

[]: Re: Quality of merchandise             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Apr 17, 2010 8:23 pm The Triforce Fighter wrote: I was thinking of picking up a neat bag on ebay with the Nerv symbol on and I was just about to put some money on it and I thought 'I have no idea on the quality of this thing!' So I thought maybe some guys on here may have purchased the said bag (as there seemed to be a few on ebay) and well thought this will be the best place to ask. http://cgi.ebay.co.uk/Evangelion-Messenger-Shoulder-Bag-Anime-Cosplay-c303_W0QQitemZ260585313941QQcmdZViewItemQQptZLH_DefaultDomain_0?hash=item3cac185695 I just don't want to go and buy the bag and then it falls apart in the middle of school X D

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Sun Apr 18, 2010 1:53 am its a knockoff so the quality probably sucks. this is an official one made by Cospa which usually means the quality is good: http://www.hlj.com/product/CSP36438

[]:             Quote Post by The Triforce Fighter » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:12 am ...You could just get yourself a plain bag and have a nerv logo printed on it at a local t-shirt store. It wouldn't be official but atleast then you know what your getting.
